heading: Course of study
label: 8466 Course of study
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6966(a).34 U.S.C. 1054(1st 11 words), .Mar. 7, 1912, ch. 5337 Stat. 736966(b).34 U.S.C. 1056R.S. 1526.In subsection (b) the words “of studies and the order of recitations” are omitted as surplusage. The words “classes will not be held on Sunday” are substituted for the words “students in said institution shall not be required to pursue their studies on Sunday”.

children.label: a
children.text: The course at the Naval Academy is four years.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary of the Navy shall arrange the course so that classes will not be held on Sunday.
